<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.14.1-Pi">
  <identifier>lamah_ice\B_basins_intermediate_all\3_shapefiles</identifier>
  <parentidentifier>LamaH-Ice</parentidentifier>
  <language>en</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>Basins_B.shp</title>
  <abstract>Shapefile belonging to the paper "LamaH-Ice | Large-Sample Data for Hydrology and Environmental Sciences for Iceland", submitted to the journal ESSD (Earth System Science Data) in October 2023. 

The features in this shapefile show the basins delineated with method B.

Attributes are described in the appendix of the mentioned paper.</abstract>
  <contact>
    <name>Hordur Helgason</name>
    <organization>University of Washington</organization>
    <position></position>
    <voice></voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email>helgason@uw.edu</email>
    <role></role>
  </contact>
  <links>
    <link mimeType="" size="" format="" description="" name="HydroShare" url="http://www.hydroshare.org/resource/86117a5f36cc4b7c90a5d54e18161c91" type="download"/>
  </links>
  <fees></fees>
  <license>Creative Commons Attribution 4.0</license>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys>
      <wkt>PROJCRS["ISN93 / Lambert 1993",BASEGEOGCRS["ISN93",DATUM["Islands Net 1993",ELLIPSOID["GRS 1980",6378137,298.257222101,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4659]],CONVERSION["Iceland Lambert 1993",METHOD["Lambert Conic Conformal (2SP)",ID["EPSG",9802]],PARAMETER["Latitude of false origin",65,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8821]],PARAMETER["Longitude of false origin",-19,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8822]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 1st standard parallel",64.25,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8823]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 2nd standard parallel",65.75,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8824]],PARAMETER["Easting at false origin",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8826]],PARAMETER["Northing at false origin",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8827]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["easting (X)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["unknown"],AREA["Iceland"],BBOX[59.96,-30.87,69.59,-5.55]],ID["EPSG",3057]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=lcc +lat_0=65 +lon_0=-19 +lat_1=64.25 +lat_2=65.75 +x_0=500000 +y_0=500000 +ellps=GRS80 +towgs84=0,0,0,0,0,0,0 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>1020</srsid>
      <srid>3057</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:3057</authid>
      <description>ISN93 / Lambert 1993</description>
      <projectionacronym>lcc</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7019</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial dimensions="2" maxx="730780" minz="0" maxy="637860" crs="EPSG:3057" minx="306240" maxz="0" miny="350080"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start></start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
